def positive_llm_api_call_in_loop_without_batching():
    rule_id = "llm_api_call_in_loop_without_batching"
    family = "mlops"
    severity = "warning"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "LLM API calls are made inside loops without batching or aggregation."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
